Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x4334 "SKYLINEATTACK-CE00-4334" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 jsr $ce00 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Skyline Attack.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $CE00 which copies 256 bytes of data from $CE20 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $4334 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the loader)
